_comment: Round 3 TEST FIXTURE ONLY - hand-built, NOT Census TIGER data. Two short synthetic streets near the recorded 080-082 GPS track's starting area (Arkadelphia, AR, ~34.180, -93.073) so nearest_road()/roads_per_second()/merge_road_matches() have something realistic-scale to match against in unit tests. Per the Round 2 precedent (synthetic_roads_test.geojson's fade/hysteresis paths), this fixture is NOT expected to visually change anything in a trip_samples render of clips 080-082, because that clip subset matches I-30 continuously (187/187 sec per CLAUDE.md) - there's no real unmatched-highway stretch for the local-road fallback to show up in. Coverage for the fallback logic itself is via tests/test_logic.py, not a rendered frame.
